name: Cream Puffs with Caramel Sauce
recipeIngredient: Sour cream or plain yogurt (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Cream Puffs:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine butter, water (1/8 cup), and salt (1/8 tsp). Bring to boiling.
2. Add flour all at once, stirring vigorously.
3. Cook and stir until the mixture forms a ball that doesn't separate. Remove from heat.
4. Cool for 10 minutes.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating with a wooden spoon after each addition until smooth.
6. Drop batter by heaping tablespoons, about 3 inches apart, onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake in a 400°F oven for 30 to 35 minutes or until golden. Cool on a wire rack.
8. Split puffs and remove any soft dough from inside.
9. Fill with Tangy Vanilla Filling.
Tangy Vanilla Filling:
1. In a heavy medium saucepan, combine sugar (3/4 cup) and cornstarch.
2. Stir in milk (1 cup). Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture thickens and becomes bubbly.
3. Cook and stir for 2 minutes more. Remove from heat.
4. Gradually stir about 1 cup of the hot mixture into beaten egg yolks.
5. Return all of the egg mixture to the saucepan. Bring to a gentle boil.
6. Reduce heat. Cook and stir for 2 minutes more.
7. Remove from heat. Stir in vanilla.
8. Pour pudding into a bowl. Cover the surface with clear plastic wrap. Chill.
Caramel Sauce:
1. In a heavy saucepan, mix sugar (1/2 cup) and cornstarch.
2. Stir in water (1/4 cup). Stir in cream (1/3 cup) and corn syrup (2 tbsp).
3. Cook and stir until bubbly (the mixture may appear curdled). Cook and stir for 2 minutes more.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in butter (1 tbsp) and vanilla (1/2 tsp).
5. Cool slightly and spoon over filled cream puffs.
